source.title: Cardiovascular disease: risk assessment and reduction, including lipid modification
source.population: Adults receiving cardiovascular risk assessment or lipid-modification review for primary or secondary prevention.
source.setting: Primary care and other clinician-led cardiovascular prevention services.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult cardiovascular risk and lipid-modification assessment and monitoring; international only and not directly validated for UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.3.12 — cardiovascular risk and lifestyle review

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular risk review and documented lifestyle discussion without autonomously generating advice.

items.rationale: The NICE section supports clinician-led cardiovascular-risk review, family and medical context, patient preferences, and documented lifestyle discussion without calculating risk or generating advice.

items.final_wording: Supports full lipid profile, blood pressure, BMI, diabetes status, renal function, liver transaminases, thyroid context, muscle symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports full lipid profile, blood pressure, BMI, diabetes status, renal function, liver transaminases, thyroid context, muscle symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.

items.rationale: The baseline assessment section supports reviewing blood pressure, lipid, diabetes, renal, liver, thyroid, BMI, and symptom context only when measured or already ordered.
